verses.text: “Note nungta-in tampi na phak theihna ding uh leh na pu na pate uh tungah piak dinga Topa a kiciamsa leitangah va pai-in na neih theihna dingun tuni-a note kiangah kong gen thupiakna khempeuh limtakin na zuih ding uh na ngaihsun ding uh hi

A thupiakte na zui uh hiam, na zui kei uh hiam cih a theihna dingin note hong niamkhiatin, na lungsim uhah bang om hiam cih a theihna dingin Topa na Pasian un sehnel gamah hih kum sawmli sung note hong paipihna lampi khempeuh na ciamteh ding uh hi

Mite, an bek tawh nungta loin Topa' kamsung panin a pusuak thu khempeuh tawh nungta hi, ci-in note hong theihsakna dingin, amah in note hong niamkhiatin hong gilkialsak a, note hita leh na pu na pate uh hita leh in a theih ngeiloh manna tawh hong vak hi
Hih kum sawmli sung note' tunga om na puan uh sialoin, na khe uh zong bawklo hi
Tua ahih manin mi khat in a tapa a khal bangin Topa na Pasian un note hong khalna thu na lungsim uhah thei un
Tua ahih ciangin ama lampi zuihna leh amah zahtakna tawh Topa note Pasian' thupiakte na zui ding uh hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa note' Pasian in, mual leh guamah a luang tuite a omna, ciktui leh tuikhuk a omna leitang
mangbuh leh mangbuhham, leenggui leh theikung, leh mang kawlsing a omna leitang, oliv kungte leh khuaizu a omna leitang
bangmah kisam loin, cilbawl loin an na nekna ding uh leitang, a suangte sik ahihna leitang, mualte sung panin sumsan na tawh theihna uh leitang ahi gam hoihah note hong paipih hi
Note in ne-in na gil uh vah ding a, note tungah gam hoih hong piakna hangin Topa na Pasian uh na phat ding uh hi.
“Tuni-a no tungah kong gen ahi ama thupiaknate leh a ngeina kipte leh a thukhamte zuihlohna tawh Topa na Pasian uh mangngilh khading na hih manun kidawm un
Tua hi kei leh, an ne-in na kham uh ciang, inn hoihte lamin tuate sungah na ten' uh ciang
na bawnghonte uh leh na tuuhonte uh tampi a phak ciang leh na khamte uh leh na ngunte uh tampi pha-in, na neih khempeuh uh tampi a phak ciangin
na lungsim uh lianin, salsuahna Egypt gam panin note a hong paikhiatpih
a lian a lauhuai sehnel gamah gul gunei leh mom-ai lak leh tui omlohna lei keu-ah a hong paipihpa, meisuang tawh a kibang suangpi panin tui a hong piapa

a tawpna-ah a hoihin na gamtat theihna ding uh a deihna-in note hong niamkhiatin a hong ze-et theihna dingin na pu na pate un a theihloh manna tawh sehnel gamah a hong vak Topa na Pasian uh na mangngilh khading uh hi
Na lungsim uhah, ‘Ka vangliatna uh leh ka thahatna un hih hauhna hong ngahsak hi,’ ci khading na hih manun kingaihsun un
Tuni-a mah bangin na pu na pate uh tungah a kiciamna a kipsak theihna dingin, na hauhna dingun vangliatna a hong piapa amah ahih manin Topa na Pasian uh na phawk ding uh hi
Topa na Pasian uh mangngilhin pasian dangte' nung zui-in tuate' na semin na biak uh leh, na sia taktak ding uh hi, ci-in tuni-in limtakin kong hilhkhol hi
Topa note' Pasian' aw ngailo ahih manun, Topa in note' mai-ah a siatsak minamte bangin note na sia ding uh hi.
